title: The River Girl
writer: Alberto Moravia, Ennio Flaiano, Basilio Franchina
actors: Sophia Loren, Gérard Oury, Lise Bourdin
plot: When peasant girl Nives is deserted by smuggler Gino Lodi, she betrays him to the police. Police officer Enzo Cinti, who loves Nives, traces her to the Po River cane-fields, where she is working as a cutter to support herself and ...
